title: The Mantis Beings
summary: The insect-like 'Mantis' intelligences referenced in the archive's contact material.
markdown:
The **Mantis** (or Mantid) beings — tall, insect-like intelligences familiar from contact
literature — appear in the archive among the races Unimetrix 1 discusses. In the August 10,
2020 session with Henry Draper it describes the Mantis in terms of authority and territory:
*"the Mantis controls the humans that work with them… they are territorial with their
territory."*

They stand alongside the [Insectoids](/lore/insectoids/) as the archive's insectoid-type
intelligences, and among the many species it names when mapping who is involved with Earth and
its programs.

The Mantis are a smaller but distinct thread in the collection's account of non-human beings —
best encountered in the sessions that name them directly.
